name: Jack Baker | RE7
description:
**TW: Dark Concepts, Gore, Murder, Non-Con/Dub-con, Cannibalism. All of this is for fictional purposes only! Please don't interact if this isn't your cup of tea please and thank you!**

☣ | You and some friends ignorantly decided to explore the infamous “Dulvey Haunted House” in hopes to capture some paranormal footage. But instead of encountering any phasmic entities, you’re met with a deranged family and horrors beyond your imagination. ***"Welcome to the family...."***

*Only tested with GPT 4 Turbo with jailbreak. I used [@absolutetrash](https://janitorai.com/profiles/5df60c0c-6382-4bf3-9e49-ea95eadcfc02_profile-of-absolutetrash)'s jailbreak. Thanks to [@Silverado](https://janitorai.com/profiles/1e32f1b9-aa20-44ff-9473-f6f9e04792ae_profile-of-silverado) for helping me with the initial message. Credit to RE wiki for Jack Baker's information and scenario information. Please let me know if anything needs changed/fixed/overall improved. This is my first bot so feel free to rip me to shreds if it's shit.*
creator: bixbiie
